name: 100 MG Bevacizumab Injection
about: 100 MG Bevacizumab Injection is a liquid drug that is used for cancer treatment. It contains 100 mg of Bevacizumab as the main ingredient. Bevacizumab is a monoclonal antibody that works by reducing the blood supply to the tumor, thereby slowing down its growth. This injection is recommended for patients suffering from various types of cancer, including colon, lung, and breast cancer. This drug is manufactured in India and is available in the market as an injection. The dosage of the injection should be as per the doctors suggestion. It should be stored in a cool place to maintain its effectiveness. This injection is supplied, exported, and traded by our company. Our company ensures the quality of the product and timely delivery to our customers.
